# Archive — pre-VDUS plans & specs

These files describe the foundation work (coreapi, extension system, layout/template/menu system, users/email, image optimizer, sitemap generator, default theme) completed March 2026. They are kept for historical context only.

**Active plans live in `docs/plans/`.** Do not edit archived files — if an old plan needs revisiting, copy the relevant section into a new plan under `docs/plans/`.
